'''thapate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:swoonily|swoonily]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-p-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:swoonily|swoonily]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| thapate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:thapate|thapate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thapatesher|thapatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thapatesherĂ«m|thapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thapatero|thapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thapateshĂ«|thapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thapateshĂ«m|thapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithapatero|gokithapatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithapateshĂ«|gokithapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithapateshĂ«m|gokithapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothapankerom|gothapankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothapankeshĂ«|gothapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothapankeshĂ«m|gothapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothapankeya|gothapankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thapaterom|thapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thapatemu|thapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thapateya|thapateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithapaterom|gokithapaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithapatemu|gokithapatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithapateya|gokithapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:thapapate|thapapate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thapapatesher|thapapatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thapapatesherĂ«m|thapapatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thapapatero|thapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thapapateshĂ«|thapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thapapateshĂ«m|thapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithapapatero|gokithapapatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithapapateshĂ«|gokithapapateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithapapateshĂ«m|gokithapapateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothapapankerom|gothapapankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothapapankeshĂ«|gothapapankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothapapankeshĂ«m|gothapapankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothapapankeya|gothapapankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thapapaterom|thapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thapapatemu|thapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thapapateya|thapapateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithapapaterom|gokithapapaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithapapatemu|gokithapapatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithapapateya|gokithapapateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:thĂŠpĂŠte|thĂŠpĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thĂŠpĂŠtesher|thĂŠpĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m|thĂŠpĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠpĂŠtero|thĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|thĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|thĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠpĂŠtero|gokithĂŠpĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«|gokithĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m|gokithĂŠpĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothĂŠpĂŠnkerom|gothĂŠpĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«|gothĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gothĂŠpĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothĂŠpĂŠnkeya|gothĂŠpĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thĂŠpĂŠterom|thĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thĂŠpĂŠtemu|thĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thĂŠpĂŠteya|thĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithĂŠpĂŠterom|gokithĂŠpĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithĂŠpĂŠtemu|gokithĂŠpĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithĂŠpĂŠteya|gokithĂŠpĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:thafpafte|thafpafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:thafpaftesher|thafpaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafpaftesherĂ«m|thafpaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafpaftero|thafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:thafpafteshĂ«|thafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafpafteshĂ«m|thafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafpaftero|gokithafpaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokithafpafteshĂ«|gokithafpafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafpafteshĂ«m|gokithafpafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gothafpafnkerom|gothafpafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gothafpafnkeshĂ«|gothafpafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gothafpafnkeshĂ«m|gothafpafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gothafpafnkeya|gothafpafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:thafpafterom|thafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:thafpaftemu|thafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:thafpafteya|thafpafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokithafpafterom|gokithafpafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokithafpaftemu|gokithafpaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokithafpafteya|gokithafpafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
